asset_name: Art Deco Tower City Backdrop (1920x1080 static)
shared_properties: The backdrop fills the full 1920x1080 canvas and establishes the vertical tower-city mood behind all puzzle geometry.
Core palette metadata remains primary #C9A84C, background #0D0B14, and accent #D4682A while architectural violet and teal tones stay inside specs.colors_hex.
Layered silhouettes preserve strong negative space for beam visibility and object readability.
differences: Foreground deco arches, midground balconies, and distant spires create a clear depth stack tuned for side-view puzzle play.
Window highlights stay sparse so beam cores remain the strongest luminous elements on screen.
A vertical climb emphasis appears through repeating elevator ribs and receding tower shafts rather than street detail.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the full-floor presentation, 16:9 framing, and tower-climb fantasy.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the art deco skyline, gold trim, and dusk mood used across the package.

reference_images.label: umbra_character
reference_images.purpose: Grounds Umbra-to-environment scale so the player silhouette reads against the world.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteBundle with optional parallax layers split into child entities at export time.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load the backdrop during FloorLoading and register it as the full-floor environment plate.
runtime_notes: Allow optional layer slicing into foreground, midground, and distant tower silhouettes for subtle parallax.
Keep all luminous window details dimmer than beam hazards and exit-door cues.
Anchor the backdrop to world-space rather than the HUD camera.

context.usage: Full-stage environment art that grounds puzzle pieces in a perpetual-dusk art deco tower city.

parallax_notes: Distant tower parallax factor target is 0.3.

acceptance_criteria: Backdrop art is exactly 1920x1080 px and preserves clear negative space for beams, objects, and character silhouettes.
Architectural layers communicate a vertical tower city without competing with puzzle-critical art.
Bright accents stay restrained so exposure-white beams remain the dominant hazard cue.
